description: AI-powered document analysis platform. Extracts clauses, identifies risks, and generates summaries from legal and business documents.

intents.name: analyze_document
intents.description: Analyze a document for key clauses, risk factors, and generate a structured summary. Supports PDF, DOCX, and plain text. Returns categorized findings with confidence scores.

document_url.description: Publicly accessible URL of the document to analyze

findings.description: Array of categorized findings with confidence scores

intents.name: batch_analyze
intents.description: Analyze multiple documents in a single request. Cost scales with the number of documents. Returns individual results for each document.

document_urls.description: Array of document URLs to analyze (max 20)

intents.name: search_templates
intents.description: Search the public template library for document analysis templates. Free to use.
